title: HN Hall of Fame — links Hacker News keeps rediscovering
excerpt: Browse 1,169 Hall of Fame links and 1,994 Candidates, with complete Hacker News submission histories.
content_html:
Browse legendary Hacker News links.

1,169 Hall of Fame links and 1,994 Candidates.

Newest class: June 2026

5 links completed the Hall rule in this class.

Open this class

How Hall induction works

5+ submissions · 3+ distinct submitters · 3+ active years · 2 qualifying breakout events from different submitters at least 720 days apart.

See exact thresholds and limitations
